profile.name: Ayush Roy
profile.role: Full Stack Developer Intern Candidate - Product Builder
profile.summary: Full-stack focused B.Tech Computer Science and Communication Engineering student at KIIT building Next.js product surfaces, Python backend systems, realtime dashboards, computer-vision tools, and interactive web experiences.
profile.availability: Open to internships, entry-level software roles, and remote collaboration

projects.title: Yor Zenith - Solar Energy Planning & Decision Support System
projects.shortDescription: Full-stack solar decision platform combining rooftop feasibility, subsidy intelligence, long-term return analysis, and 3D visualization.
projects.fullDescription: Developed a solar planning platform to analyze rooftop feasibility and estimate solar energy generation. Built interactive 3D visualization dashboards using React and Three.js to simulate solar installation scenarios, implemented logic around rooftop parameters, solar irradiance, and subsidy estimates, and designed modular UI dashboards for solar potential analysis and energy generation forecasting.

projects.title: Yor Ai vs Real Image
projects.shortDescription: ML pipeline to classify AI-generated vs real images using texture-based features (LBP, GLCM) and an SVM classifier.
projects.fullDescription: Uses OpenCV to extract image features, Scikit-Learn to train an SVM classifier, Local Binary Pattern and GLCM for image texture analysis, and Streamlit for uploading images and viewing prediction results.

projects.title: Yor Mentor Mentee System
projects.shortDescription: Python system for managing mentor-mentee relationships with matching logic, Flask API support, and Tkinter desktop UI.

projects.title: Yor-Helios
projects.shortDescription: Energy-monitoring platform for anomaly detection, realtime alerts, geospatial views, and operator dashboards.

achievements: Completed Pratham, Dwitiya, and Tritiya Sopan levels in Bharat Scouts & Guides
Top 3% global rank in Counter-Strike 2 Premier competitive ladder
